intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“whole village -> savings -> must have been found -> not returned -> wrapped wallet -> 50 per cent -> 25 per cent -> paid back -> 100 per cent honest”的良心分期付款链读顺。被动语态要读清楚，百分比纸条要轻一点、带一点荒唐的幽默感。

sentences.text: The whole village soon learnt that a large sum of money had been lost.
sentences.focus_zh: The whole village 后轻停；a large sum of money 是一大笔钱；had been lost 是过去完成被动，要读成一个结果。

sentences.text: Sam Benton, the local butcher, had lost his wallet while taking his savings to the post office.
sentences.focus_zh: Sam Benton 和 the local butcher 是同位说明；savings 是存款；to the post office 要自然连读。

sentences.text: Sam was sure that the wallet must have been found by one of the villagers, but it was not returned to him.
sentences.focus_zh: must have been found 是对过去被动事件的高把握推测；but it was not returned 要读出转折和 mystery。

sentences.text: Three months passed, and then one morning, Sam found his wallet outside his front door.
sentences.focus_zh: Three months passed 后停顿，拉出时间跨度；outside his front door 是钱包突然出现的位置。

sentences.text: It had been wrapped up in newspaper and it contained half the money he had lost, together with a note which said: 'A thief, yes, but only 50 per cent a thief!'
sentences.focus_zh: had been wrapped up 是被动；half the money 和 together with a note 要分清；纸条部分要读得轻松一点，像荒唐自辩。

sentences.text: Two months later, some more money was sent to Sam with another note: 'Only 25 per cent a thief now!'
sentences.focus_zh: Two months later 是新的时间点；was sent 是被动；25 per cent 的纸条要读出越来越荒唐的百分比幽默。

sentences.text: In time, all Sam's money was paid back in this way.
sentences.focus_zh: In time 是 eventually；all Sam's money 要读出全部还清；was paid back 是被动结果。

sentences.text: The last note said: 'I am 100 per cent honest now!'
sentences.focus_zh: The last note said 后停顿；100 per cent honest 要读得自豪但有点荒唐，体现结尾笑点。
